title: Wandering Cocoa
description: Let's add Cocoa Beans to the trade pool for Wandering Traders
body:
## Wandering Cocoa
[![main.yml](https://github.com/theomenden/TheOmenDen.WanderingCocoa/actions/workflows/main.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/theomenden/TheOmenDen.WanderingCocoa/actions/workflows/main.yml)
[![Mod Downloads(This text can be changed to whatever you want)](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/title/1096906.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/n6THt0cM)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?labelColor=black&color=grey&label=&query=title&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/n6THt0cM&style=flat&logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://modrinth.com/mod/n6THt0cM)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/n6THt0cM)](https://modrinth.com/mod/n6THt0cM)

![You can use my code: theomenden to get 25% off your first month on a server!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/06571c95-44fb-4192-87fd-5ec08cd0c08d.webp)
### Problem:
* On Bedrock Edition, wandering traders offer up Cocoa Beans as a trade. This isn't present on Java Edition.
### Solution:
* Installing this mod will add Cocoa Beans as possible trades via wandering traders for emeralds, and will add in the ability to trade Cocoa Beans as brown dye.
### Credits:
* Shedaniel for Architectury
* Jam Core for Jamlib
